handoff_summary: force_revise=true: target_file is clean (TODO removed) and coder receipt is schema-valid tau.provider_dag_node_receipt.v1 with all required fields, but max-exhaustion test requires REVISE. Feedback: message.txt is a single static completion sentence — next coder should populate the file with a concrete provider DAG description: which provider (tau-deterministic-visible) ran, what the DAG node topology looks like, the initial TODO text that was replaced, and a brief summary of what the coder receipt records. Include at minimum: original TODO content, provider_id, attempt number, and the fact that coder receipt status=PASS. This simulates the force-revise gate that would be used in a real provider-DAG test to verify the reviewer node detects the forced-revise flag and returns REVISE with actionable feedback regardless of pass quality.
